intentSynonyms: get a recently played in spotify
look up a recently played in spotify
fetch a single recently played in spotify
view one specific recently played in spotify
get recently played tracks in spotify
description: Get tracks the user has recently played. Returns up to 50 items with track details and the timestamp of each play. Use before/after cursors for pagination.

limit.description: Number of items to return (1-50, default 20)

before.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds — return items played before this time

after.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds — return items played after this time
